column1: # Sample Home Assistant-style sensor export for Verdant CSV Preview partner demo.
# This file contains DEMO / SAMPLE data only. No real user data, no secrets, no tokens.
# Format: TSV (tab-separated). Verdant auto-detects tabs and labels source = tsv.
# Includes multiple suspicious value examples to trigger flagging:
#   - EC values look like µS/cm but header says mS/cm (flagged as ec_unit_ambiguous)
# Suspicious value block — triggers multiple flags
# pH out of range — triggers ph_out_of_range
